notes: Level 9 packet 05-09 reviewed manually against canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON.
Open findings in this packet are schema gaps for unlimited target counts, condition removal, form replacement, and object ignition rather than unresolved spell readings.

invulnerability::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: The only ending condition is normal concentration/duration ending, already represented by timed concentration duration; damage immunity is now a DEFENSIVE effect.
invulnerability::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now includes DEFENSIVE immunity to all damage.

mass-heal::choice_or_mode.issue: Actionable open: The current schema cannot honestly encode “any number of creatures” or a player-divided healing pool except with maxTargets 999 and an AI prompt.
mass-heal::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a healing-pool distribution bucket with unlimited target count and player allocation rules.
mass-heal::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON uses maxTargets 999, HEALING dice 700, Utility Options, and playerInputRequired prompt.

mass-heal::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The visible-within-range target constraint is already represented by lineOfSight true and targeting range 60.
mass-heal::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps lineOfSight true and range 60 feet.

mass-heal::healing_or_restoration.issue: Actionable open: Healing is represented, but condition removal is still utility-only because the runtime has no remove-condition effect type.
mass-heal::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a condition-removal/restoration bucket for ending named conditions without applying a new condition.
mass-heal::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes HEALING 700 and a Condition removal Utility Option.

mass-heal::object_stats_or_damageability.issue: Closed: The Hit Point restoration pool is now represented as a HEALING effect with dice 700 plus explicit distribution options.
mass-heal::object_stats_or_damageability.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required in this packet.
mass-heal::object_stats_or_damageability.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now has a HEALING effect for the 700 Hit Point pool.

mass-heal::status_or_state_change.issue: Actionable open: Removing Blinded, Deafened, and Poisoned needs a remove-condition effect type; using STATUS_CONDITION would invert the mechanic.
mass-heal::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a condition-removal/restoration bucket for named condition endings.
mass-heal::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records the removal list in Utility Options only.

mass-polymorph::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: Target count, beast-form choice, same/different forms, and per-target form choice are now split into Utility Options and an AI prompt.
mass-polymorph::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
mass-polymorph::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON maxTargets is 10 and controlOptions/prompt capture target and form choices.

mass-polymorph::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Actionable open: Unwilling shapechanger automatic success is not a normal advantage/disadvantage modifier and needs an auto-success save rule.
mass-polymorph::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a save auto-success/auto-failure bucket keyed by target filter.
mass-polymorph::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records the shapechanger auto-success in Utility Options and prompt.

mass-polymorph::target_filter_or_eligibi.issue: Closed: The up-to-ten creature limit and visible target requirements are now represented by targeting maxTargets 10, lineOfSight true, and Utility Options.
mass-polymorph::target_filter_or_eligibi.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON uses multi targeting with maxTargets 10.

mass-polymorph::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The caster-seen target requirement is already represented by lineOfSight true.

mass-polymorph::message_or_communication.issue: Closed: The inability to speak and action limits are now split into the Action and communication limits Utility Option.
mass-polymorph::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required in this pass.
mass-polymorph::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve speech, spellcasting, hands, and speech restrictions.

mass-polymorph::healing_or_restoration.issue: Actionable open: Temporary hit points based on chosen form HP can be flagged as defensive temporary_hp, but the schema cannot calculate form-derived HP or mark it as non-replaceable.
mass-polymorph::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a form-derived temporary hit point bucket with replacement restrictions.
mass-polymorph::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes DEFENSIVE temporary_hp and Utility Options for form HP and non-replacement.

mass-polymorph::object_stats_or_damageab.issue: Actionable open: Replacing game statistics while retaining hit points, alignment, and personality needs a transformation/stat-replacement schema.
mass-polymorph::object_stats_or_damageab.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a transformation bucket for stat replacement, retained traits, form eligibility, and equipment melding.
mass-polymorph::object_stats_or_damageab.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records these facts in Utility Options and temporary_hp effect.

mass-polymorph::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Reversion on no temporary hit points, death, or spell end is now split into a Reversion Utility Option.
mass-polymorph::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
mass-polymorph::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include the reversion rule.

meteor-swarm::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Dexterity save for half damage is already represented on both damage effects.
meteor-swarm::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps saveType Dexterity and saveEffect half for Fire and Bludgeoning damage.

meteor-swarm::target_filter_or_eligibili.issue: Closed: Four visible points, creatures, non-worn/non-carried objects, and once-only overlap are now represented by Targeting Max 4, validTargets, Utility Options, and prompt.
meteor-swarm::target_filter_or_eligibili.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required in this pass.
meteor-swarm::target_filter_or_eligibili.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON maxTargets is 4, validTargets includes objects, and controlOptions/prompt capture overlap.

meteor-swarm::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: The ground-impact/four-point area behavior is now represented by Utility Options; there is no lasting terrain created.
meteor-swarm::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include four impact points.

meteor-swarm::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The visible-point requirement is already represented by lineOfSight true and now reinforced in the prompt.
meteor-swarm::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps lineOfSight true and asks for visible points.

meteor-swarm::environmental_change.issue: Actionable open: Flammable object ignition is preserved, but the runtime lacks a burning/ignition effect for objects.
meteor-swarm::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add an object ignition/burning bucket for flammable objects and ongoing burn state.
meteor-swarm::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records Flammable ignition in Utility Options only.

power-word-heal::reaction_or_opportunity.issue: Closed: The Prone target reaction stand-up is now represented by a granted Reaction and Utility Option.
power-word-heal::reaction_or_opportunity.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
power-word-heal::reaction_or_opportunity.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON utility grantedActions includes the conditional Reaction.

power-word-heal::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The visible creature within 60 feet requirement is already represented by lineOfSight true and targeting range.
power-word-heal::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps single targeting, range 60, and lineOfSight true.

power-word-heal::social_or_knowledge_eff.issue: Closed: The “power word” presentation has no separate social/knowledge mechanic beyond verbal casting and healing/restoration.
power-word-heal::social_or_knowledge_eff.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change needed beyond healing and restoration extraction.

power-word-heal::healing_or_restoration.issue: Actionable open: Full healing is represented with a HEALING effect, but named condition removal still needs a remove-condition effect type.
power-word-heal::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a condition-removal/restoration bucket for named condition endings.
power-word-heal::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes HEALING all_hit_points and Utility Options for condition removal.

power-word-heal::object_stats_or_damagea.issue: Closed: Full Hit Point restoration is now represented as a HEALING effect with all_hit_points.
power-word-heal::object_stats_or_damagea.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required in this packet.
power-word-heal::object_stats_or_damagea.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes a HEALING effect for full hit point restoration.

power-word-heal::status_or_state_change.issue: Actionable open: Ending Charmed, Frightened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, Stunned, and optionally Prone needs condition-removal support; applying status effects would be wrong.
power-word-heal::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a condition-removal/restoration bucket for named conditions and optional reaction-based state ending.
power-word-heal::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records condition removal in Utility Options and granted Reaction for Prone stand-up.
